content: I don't know what I'm doing, im on chapter 5, and this team has carried me through every chapter besides chapter 1, because I didn't have any of em, uhh thoughts?

The ghelot/pollux/corprosant rerun banner is coming soon and my understanding is that all of them are good. I can confidentially roll e3 on any one of them. Based on the characters I already have, which one would you recommend that I pull? I have checked the mythag compendium but I don’t have some of the recommended characters for suggested teams

Pollux and castor are really good cores for a team in general; personally, if you're going to be using castor I'd suggest using Pollux as your main dps and having jenkin for additional damage, but that looks like a solid team

Or should I swap Ramona for Caecus as well? I don't know how well Caecus synergizes with Corpo/Pontos. If Ramona is better I'll stick with her.

corpo wants e3, not e2, her e3 is very important to core gameplay even if pontos fixed damage doesnt interact with vulnerable

i personally believe winkle is better than casiah since she provides weakness and that team already barely has defense but if you dont find yourself struggling with survival casiah is fine for the draw

corpo wheel is not that good on her, but its a great generic DR wheel with a good effect i think its heavily underrated especially for people like horla or faint, if you want to run a second ssr wheel with blade on corpo consider miryam wheel, aurita wheel, jenkin wheel and maybe something else im forgetting atm
Got it I'll make sure to grab E3.

Hi everyone! I'm new, i got a free awaken roll chance, who should i take first?
largely would depend on which realm you prefer. if you dont have a preference yet, you may want to hold onto it until you have an idea which fits your playstyle first.

The hottest one 
Here are your options, if you're curious
I see, i still don't know anything about the realm tho

chaos is kinda a default, primarily runs  keygen (for using posse icon in bottom left in a match), aequor is tentacles passive damage and/or shielding, caro is blood/embryo secondary effects or boosting to get ults faster, bar can be used to heal you as well. ultra largly a realm for str down (reduces damage) and building to get an extra turn. only two realms can be mixed, if mixing any two other than chaos, their main mechanics (the bars at top left) are half of a single realm full team, the exception to that is chaos, who mixes well with anyone and actually boosts the other realms. so pros and cons to any of them.  as to the list above: chaos = nautila, aequor = sanga/caceus, caro = faint, ultra = winkle are the most recommened units (i actually prefer tinct over winkle though). All in all its up to you, and in time you will eventually get all standard awakeners and likely most limiteds as well when they rerun.
aequor is considered the easiest and most forgiving realm at the start, ultra is considered the most challenging.
What is currently the best stall team?

but ye agrippa is worse until u get to scale
how good is alert? 2 alert = 2pts of shield?
1 alert = 1 extra shield from a card (that gives shield)
2 alert = +2 shield from every time u shield
kinda works like the other guy said
some cards give u shield multiple times like oegir x cost and erica x cost
in which cases alert gives the bonus multiple times there
